'''Elriss''' was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

Some time between [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]] and [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] sent [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] including [[Daric LaRone]] to Elriss. While on it, the stormtroopers triple-checked the identities of the population of a village, and made all its inhabitants wait for six hours in the rain while doing so.

==Appearances==
